brief_title: A Long Term Safety Study With Atrasentan
official_title: A Phase II/III Extension Study to Evaluate the Safety and Tolerability of Atrasentan
brief_summary: The primary purpose of the study is to evaluate long-term safety and tolerability of atrasentan 10 mg in men with hormone refractory prostate cancer.

locations.facility: University of Pittsburgh Department of Urology

primary_outcomes.measure: Change from baseline in Karnofsky performance status
Stratification by treatment group from prior study
